'''ronathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinist|vaccinist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinist|vaccinist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ronathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronathithi|ronathithi]] || [[word:ronathiji|ronathiji]] || [[word:ronathishi|ronathishi]] || [[word:ronathiki|ronathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronathuthuthu|ronathuthuthu]] || [[word:ronathujuju|ronathujuju]] || [[word:ronathushushu|ronathushushu]] || [[word:ronathukuku|ronathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronathuthu|ronathuthu]] || [[word:ronathuju|ronathuju]] || [[word:ronathushu|ronathushu]] || [[word:ronathuku|ronathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronathufthuf|ronathufthuf]] || [[word:ronathufjuf|ronathufjuf]] || [[word:ronathufshuf|ronathufshuf]] || [[word:ronathufkuf|ronathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronathethe|ronathethe]] || [[word:ronatheje|ronatheje]] || [[word:ronatheshe|ronatheshe]] || [[word:ronatheke|ronatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronathothotho|ronathothotho]] || [[word:ronathojojo|ronathojojo]] || [[word:ronathoshosho|ronathoshosho]] || [[word:ronathokoko|ronathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronathotho|ronathotho]] || [[word:ronathojo|ronathojo]] || [[word:ronathosho|ronathosho]] || [[word:ronathoko|ronathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronathofthof|ronathofthof]] || [[word:ronathofjof|ronathofjof]] || [[word:ronathofshof|ronathofshof]] || [[word:ronathofkof|ronathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfthĂŻf|ronathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfjĂŻf|ronathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfshĂŻf|ronathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfkĂŻf|ronathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ronathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ronathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ronathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ronathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfthĂŻf|ronathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfjĂŻf|ronathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfshĂŻf|ronathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfkĂŻf|ronathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfthĂŻf|ronathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfjĂŻf|ronathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfshĂŻf|ronathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ronathĂŻfkĂŻf|ronathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronathĂŠthĂŠ|ronathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ronathĂŠjĂŠ|ronathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ronathĂŠshĂŠ|ronathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ronathĂŠkĂŠ|ronathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronathathatha|ronathathatha]] || [[word:ronathajaja|ronathajaja]] || [[word:ronathashasha|ronathashasha]] || [[word:ronathakaka|ronathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronathatha|ronathatha]] || [[word:ronathaja|ronathaja]] || [[word:ronathasha|ronathasha]] || [[word:ronathaka|ronathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronathafthaf|ronathafthaf]] || [[word:ronathafjaf|ronathafjaf]] || [[word:ronathafshaf|ronathafshaf]] || [[word:ronathafkaf|ronathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ronathasha|ronathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronathshĂ«asha|ronathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronathroasha|ronathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronathmuasha|ronathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronathyaasha|ronathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronathnkshĂ«asha|goronathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronathnkroasha|goronathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronathnkmuasha|goronathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronathnkyaasha|goronathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ronanathasha|ronanathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronanathshĂ«asha|ronanathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronanathroasha|ronanathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronanathmuasha|ronanathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronanathyaasha|ronanathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronanathnkshĂ«asha|goronanathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronanathnkroasha|goronanathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronanathnkmuasha|goronanathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronanathnkyaasha|goronanathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:renĂŠthasha|renĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:renĂŠthshĂ«asha|renĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:renĂŠthroasha|renĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:renĂŠthmuasha|renĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:renĂŠthyaasha|renĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorenĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gorenĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorenĂŠthnkroasha|gorenĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorenĂŠthnkmuasha|gorenĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorenĂŠthnkyaasha|gorenĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ronfathasha|ronfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronfathshĂ«asha|ronfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronfathroasha|ronfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronfathmuasha|ronfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronfathyaasha|ronfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronfathnkshĂ«asha|goronfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronfathnkroasha|goronfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronfathnkmuasha|goronfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronfathnkyaasha|goronfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
